holdings.infoBox: LOGO is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 7.72%, Netflix at 6.44%, Apple at 5.02%, Alphabet at 4.56%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 4.51%.

overview.description: The Alpha Brands Consumption Leaders ETF (LOGO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed ETF that targets leading or attractive brands in consumption-focused industries. The fund invests in equity securities from around the world of any market capitalization. LOGO was launched on May 27, 2025 and is issued by Alpha Brands.
